data.title: MODALO Unveils German Handcrafted Luxury Watch Winders
data.description: In Hamburg, Germany, MODALO is revolutionizing luxury watch maintenance with cutting-edge watch winding technology. This advancement guarantees the preservation of long-term value for automatic watches.

data.title: Tequila Don Julio 1942 Introduces Made to Be Raised with Limited-Edition Bottle Design Celebrating the FIFA World Cup 2026™
data.description: The film featuring Thierry Henry, a FIFA World Cup™ champion, is being released in conjunction with a special edition Tequila Don Julio 1942 bottle design. Fans have the opportunity to acquire this unique gold bottle, designed for jubilant celebrations of soccer worldwide. Tequila Don Julio, a proud supporter of the FIFA World Cup™ 2026, introduces the exquisite gold bottle...

data.title: Kunes Auto & RV Group Extends United Way Campaign After Strong March Sales Push, Commits to Reaching Full $100,000 Goal
data.description: Car dealerships in the Milwaukee area have exceeded sales of 550 vehicles and have committed to donating until they reach a milestone of 1,000 cars sold. One of the rapidly expanding dealership groups in the Midwest, Kunes Auto & RV Group, located in Delavan, Wisconsin, has made this pledge.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Kai/
data.description: Kai has appointed Nick Degnan as Chief Revenue Officer in response to a significant increase in demand for machine-speed security. This announcement was made on 02-Apr-2026. The company saw a surge in demand for its security services, prompting this strategic move. Nick Degnan will now lead the revenue department as the company navigates this period of growth. For more details, please refer to the updated news release.

data.title: Blue Yonder Named a Leader in the Inaugural 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ Supply Chain Planning Solutions: Discrete Industries
data.description: In Dallas, Blue Yonder, an AI company specializing in supply chain, has been named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Supply Chain Planning Solutions (Discrete Industries). This recognition is based on the company's Ability to Execute and Completeness of Vision. Blue Yonder has a strong track record in the Supply Chain Planning Solutions space, being recognized for over ten years. This recent acknowledgment signifies the robustness and efficacy of Blue Yonder's solutions in supporting supply chain operations.

data.title: The Ordinary General Shareholders' Meeting of Pieno žvaigždės is convened
data.description: The annual General Meeting of Shareholders (referred to as the “Meeting”) of the company "Pieno žvaigždės" will be held on April 28, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. The company is located at Perkūnkiemio str. 3, Vilnius, Republic of Lithuania, with a company code 124665536 and VAT payer code LT246655314. The Meeting is being convened by the Company's Board and will be held at the same registered address. Shareholder registration will commence at 10:30 a.m. The Meeting is a vital event for the company and its stakeholders.

data.title: Cumulus Media's Westwood One Presents Exclusive Full-Court Audio Coverage of the 2026 NCAA® Division I Men's and Women's Basketball Final Four® and National Championship Games on Multiple Platforms
data.description: Westwood One Sports has revealed its programming lineup for the Final Four of the Men's and Women's Basketball Tournaments. The coverage will include live broadcasts of the games, analysis, commentary, and interviews. The Final Four games are set to take place on [specific date] for the Men's Tournament and [specific date] for the Women's Tournament. This comprehensive coverage will reach a wide audience of sports fans across the country, with an estimated [number] of listeners tuning in to catch the action. The programming lineup aims to provide in-depth insights and entertainment for basketball enthusiasts throughout the exciting Final Four rounds.

data.title: HCM IV Acquisition Corp. Announces the Separate Trading of its Class A Ordinary Shares and Warrants, Commencing April 6, 2026
data.description: In Norwalk, CT, on April 2, 2026, HCM IV Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: HACQU) disclosed that starting April 6, 2026, investors who purchased units in the Company’s IPO will have the option to individually trade the Company’s Class A ordinary shares and warrants from the units. Upon separation, whole warrants will trade as no fractional warrants will be issued. The separated Class A ordinary shares and warrants will be listed on Nasdaq as "HACQ" and "HACQW" respectively. Units that remain consolidated will continue trading as "HACQU" on Nasdaq.

data.title: Convocation of the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of INVL Baltic Real Estate and draft resolutions on the agenda items
data.description: INVL Baltic Real Estate, a closed-end real estate investment company with a legal entity code 152105644 and headquarters at Gynėjų str. 14, Vilnius, Lithuania, has declared the convening of the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders on 24 April 2026. The meeting was initiated and decided upon by the management company UAB “INVL Asset Management”.

data.title: Advent Technologies Enters into License and Joint Development Agreement with EH Group Engineering AG to Advance HTPEM Fuel Cell Technology for Stationary Power Applications
data.description: In Livermore, California, on April 2, 2026, Advent Technologies Holdings, Inc., a prominent player in fuel cell and hydrogen technology, has signed a license and joint development agreement with EH Group Engineering AG, an innovative company based in Switzerland. The agreement between Advent and EH Group signifies a significant collaboration in the fuel cell industry, bringing together Advent's expertise with EH Group's high-performance fuel cell technology.
